Documentation développeur

Cette section documente automatiquement les modules Python du projet à partir des docstrings présentes dans le code source.

Application principale

Vues principales

oc_lettings_site.views.index(request)

Function that renders the home page of the application. This view displays the main landing page and provides access to the different sections of the application, such as lettings and profiles.

Paramètres:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

Renvoie:

the rendered home page response

Type renvoyé:

HTTPResponse

Lève:

Http404 – if the requested page does not exist

Application lettings

Modèles

class lettings.models.Address(*args, **kwargs)

Bases : Model

Represent a postal address associated with a letting. This model stores the different components of a physical address, with street number, street name, city, state, zip code, and country ISO code.

number

the street number

Type:

PositiveIntegerField

street

the street name

Type:

CharField

city

the city name

Type:

CharField

state

the 2 character state code

Type:

CharField

zip_code

the zip or postal code

Type:

PositiveIntegerField

country_iso_code

The 3 character ISO country code

Type:

CharField

exception DoesNotExist

Bases : ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases : MultipleObjectsReturned

class lettings.models.Letting(*args, **kwargs)

Bases : Model

Represent a rental letting. This model stores the title of the letting and links it to a unique address.

title

the title of the letting

Type:

CharField

address

the address associated with the letting

Type:

OneToOneField

exception DoesNotExist

Bases : ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases : MultipleObjectsReturned

Vues

lettings.views.index(request)

Function that renders the lettings index page. This view retrieves all available letting records and provides access to the different sections of the application, such as home and profiles

Paramètres:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

Renvoie:

the rendered lettings index page containing the list of all lettings.

Type renvoyé:

HTTPResponse

Lève:

Http404 – If no letting exists for the given identifier.

lettings.views.letting_detail(request, letting_id)

Function that renders the detail page for a specific letting. This view retrieves a letting by its identifier and displays its title and address information. If no letting matches the provided identifier, a 404 error is raised.

Paramètres:

  • request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

  • letting_id (int) – The unique identifier of the letting to retrieve

Renvoie:

the rendered detail page for the selected letting.

Type renvoyé:

HttpResponse

Lève:

Http404 – If no letting exists for the given identifier.

Application profiles

Modèles

class profiles.models.Profile(*args, **kwargs)

Bases : Model

Represent an extended user profile. This model extends the Django’s User model with additional profile information, such as the user’s favorite city.

user

the related Django user instance.

Type:

OneToOneField

favorite_city

the user’s favorite city.

Type:

CharField

exception DoesNotExist

Bases : ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases : MultipleObjectsReturned

Vues

profiles.views.index(request)

Function that renders the profiles index page. This view retrieves all user profiles and provides access to the different sections of the application, such as home and lettings

Paramètres:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

Renvoie:

the rendered profiles index page containing the list of all profiles.

Type renvoyé:

HTTPResponse

Lève:

Http404 – if the requested profile does not exist.

profiles.views.profile_detail(request, username)

Function that renders the detail page for a specific profile. This view retrieves a profile associated with the given username and displays its information. If not matching profile is found, a 404 error is raised.

Paramètres:

  • request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

  • username (str) – The username associated with the profile retrieve.

Renvoie:

the rendered detail page for the selected profile.

Type renvoyé:

HttpResponse

Lève:

Http404 – If no profile exists for the given username.
